Description: Bare names without a `.Family` prefix (e.g. EvalFile, Beehiveid). Mostly engine internals.
ACL types used by the firewall / trust model.
SQL Server Analysis Services / Tabular OLAP connector.
Auth-mode constants for API-key connectors (header / query / custom).
Azure Data Explorer / Kusto connector entry.
Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 connector.
Azure Blob / Table / Data Lake storage connector.
Binary value operations (length, slice, encode, base64, compression).
Base64 / Hex encoding constants for Binary.FromText / ToText.
Declarative parser-combinator framework for binary streams ("Wireshark in M" — describe a wire format, get a typed parser).
Occurrence constants (optional / repeating / required) used by BinaryFormat.
Big / little endian constants used by BinaryFormat.
Text-combine combinators (delimiter, lengths, positions). Symmetric with Splitter.
Microsoft Dataverse / Common Data Service connector.
Sort / equality comparer constants and factories (Ordinal, OrdinalIgnoreCase, FromCulture).
Compression algorithm constants for Binary.Compress / Decompress (GZip, Deflate, etc.).
OLAP cube operations (Analysis Services / SAP BW / Essbase). Niche enterprise OLAP.
Date value operations: arithmetic, parts, IsIn*, FromText, formatting.
DateTime value operations (date + time without zone).
DateTimeZone value operations (date + time + offset). Includes culture-aware ToText / FromText.
Microsoft DocumentDB (legacy name for Cosmos DB).
Expression evaluation primitives (Expression.Evaluate — run M-as-text against an env).
Cryptographic hash functions (CRC32 / MD5 / SHA1 / SHA256).
Query-folding helper for per-item expressions inside List.* projections.
Table.Join / NestedJoin kind (Inner / LeftOuter / FullOuter / etc.).
Line-oriented text helpers (FromText / ToText / FromBinary / ToBinary).
List operations — the broadest family. Filter, map, reduce, sort, generate, statistical.
MDX query language primitives (against AS / SSAS cubes).
MySQL database connector. mrsflow exposes both `MySQL.Database` and an extension `MySQL.Query` for raw SQL.
Number value operations: arithmetic, rounding, formatting, parsing, bitwise.
Text/List PositionOf occurrence enum (First / Last / All) + BinaryFormat reuse.
Generic ODBC connector. mrsflow has a real implementation with lazy/folded queries.
OLE DB connector (legacy Windows DB connectivity).
Parquet file reader. mrsflow extension; PQ exposes `Parquet.Document` natively.
PostgreSQL database connector. mrsflow extension `PostgreSQL.Query` for raw SQL.
Decimal / Double precision enum for numeric typing.
Record operations: field access, transform, combine, FromList / FromTable round-trips.
Replacer.ReplaceValue / .ReplaceText — passed as the replacer arg to Table.ReplaceValue.
Number.Round mode (ToEven / Up / Down / AwayFromZero / TowardZero).
Text-split combinators (by delimiter, lengths, character transition). Symmetric with Combiner.
SQL Server / TDS connector. mrsflow has a native TDS implementation via tiberius.
SQL query-folding helper (SchemaFrom / ToExpression). Used by custom connector authors, not end users.
Table operations — the largest family by function count. Filter, group, join, pivot, transform, expand.
Text (string) operations: split, replace, format, length, encoding-conversion. UTF-16 code-unit semantics matching .NET.
Encoding constants for Text.FromBinary / ToBinary (UTF-8 the only one decoded).
Type-value construction and introspection (Type.Is, RecordFields, TableSchema, etc.).
Generic value introspection (Compare, Equals, Is, NativeQuery, Metadata).
HTTP verb constants (Get / Post / Put / Delete / Patch / Head).
